message: 🌱 Add spire: Agent K8S workload attestor support for cgroups v2 mission (#623)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "spire-4004-agent-k8s-workload-attestor-support-for-cgroups-v2",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "spire: Agent K8S workload attestor support for cgroups v2",
+    "description": "Agent K8S workload attestor support for cgroups v2. Requested by 3+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current spire deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your spire version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire\nhelm list -n spire 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working spire installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review spire configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant spire configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire\nkubectl get configmap -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=spire\n```\n* **Version**: 1.5.5+\n* **Platform**: K8S with amd64 linux kernel using cgroups v2\n* **Subsystem**: Agent k8s workload attestor\n\nCurrently k8s workload attestor is extracting podUID and containerUID from"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Agent K8S workload attestor support for cgroups v2",
+        "description": "Add support for matching cgroups v2 with systemd driver to docker workloadattestor.\n\nApply the `dockerCGroupsRE` to candidate path elements extracted by the `<id>` matcher in the DSL. Related to #4004.\n```yaml\nhostPID: true\nhostNetwork: true\ndnsPolicy: ClusterFirstWithHostNet\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire\nkubectl get events -n spire --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Agent K8S workload attestor support for cgroups v2\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Add support for matching cgroups v2 with systemd driver to docker workloadattestor.\n\nApply the `dockerCGroupsRE` to candidate path elements extracted by the `<id>` matcher in the DSL. Related to #4004.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "hostPID: true\nhostNetwork: true\ndnsPolicy: ClusterFirstWithHostNet",
+        "k exec -it busybox -- /bin/sh\n/ # cat /proc/302967/cgroup\n0::/../../kubepods-besteffort-pod02b5aa9b_9013_49b5_9755_efeb06552752.slice/cri-containerd-222a5371beed8c0ad58e23d1cd39e13bc113915a385d3fea4510e1cd404868c2.scope\n/ # cat /proc/329596/cgroup\n0::/",
+        "k exec -it ds/spire-agent -c spire-agent -- /bin/sh\n/opt/spire # cat /proc/302967/cgroup\n0::/\n/opt/spire # cat /proc/329596/cgroup\n0::/../../kubepods-besteffort-podb2dce23b_8b3a_4356_b903_56152d488916.slice/cri-containerd-cf6d9de603ab1f665fc84f88c22f761678fcaae86b98a3936e0b9717740146aa.scope"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+    },

+  },
